live_read_only_reconfirmation.note: Live read-only dry-run against the original historical wallet returned 25 current records (13 BUY / 12 SELL), all classified as source-provided strong identities (proving the correction). No --write / --confirm-production-db used; write=None; source_trades stayed 19. This reconfirmation does not disprove the historical first live pull (which inserted the 14 BUY rows); it independently confirms the wallet is live and the corrected identity path works.
